boundary: Cockpit operator-flow verification via agent-browser or Playwright
commands: docker compose --profile baseline --profile runtime --profile auth --profile idp --profile authz --profile erp --profile tools --profile cockpit -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.local.yml up --wait
Playwright Chromium headed capture against http://localhost:5173/runs with VITE_PORTARIUM_ENABLE_MSW=false
verifiedOperatorSurfaces: Approval detail with Plan and Evidence Artifacts

releaseCandidateAttempt.summary: Cockpit was captured in Dev live mode with MSW disabled, but the production-like API stack was unavailable and local API fetches were blocked by the current Cockpit CSP. This does not verify queue/detail/decision/resume/redaction through the live UI.

currentRunEvidence: Deterministic boundary captured; release-candidate headed browser attempt recorded an environment limitation and does not promote the browser evidence gate.
